subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Lamp through which all contingent things were illumined, and by Thy sovereignty which hath encompassed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی اسئلک بسراجک الذی به اضاء الممکنات و بسلطانک الذی احاط
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for unity
